items.claim: Fatima Klein has improved her grappling background throughout her career.
items.quote: We've seen Klein's got a good grappling background as well. We've seen her elevate that game at that part of her game throughout her career.

items.claim: Fatima Klein is a better striker than Reachi.
items.quote: I think on the feet, while Reachi throws some big power shots, she's not as good on the feet as Fatima Mle.

items.claim: Reachi has a slight grappling advantage over Fatima Klein.
items.quote: the grappling while Reachi may have a little bit of an advantage there, I don't think it's by much.

items.claim: Mitch Ramirez is defensively responsible against submissions.
items.quote: we've seen that Ramirez is very defensively responsible against submissions

items.claim: Mitch Ramirez's striking is labored and predictable.
items.quote: his striking on the feet. He does have power, but he's a little bit labored and a little bit predictable.

items.claim: Chase Hooper does not take a shot very well.
items.quote: he doesn't take a shot very well.

items.claim: Jared Cannonier has slowed down in speed and movement.
items.quote: we've clearly seen that he's slowed down. He's absolutely slowed down. The speed isn't the same. He's a little bit labored in there.

items.claim: Christian Leroy Duncan has a physical size advantage over Jared Cannonier.
items.quote: at 6'2 with a 79 in reach, he's going to be a little bit bigger than Jared in there.
